evals.prompt: 帮我看看美股各板块的轮动情况，哪些板块有动量优势
evals.expected_output: Runs sector scan with US SPDR ETFs, uses SPY as benchmark, analyzes momentum leaders/laggards with relative strength context

evals.prompt: I want to compare tech sub-sectors — semiconductors vs software vs cybersecurity vs cloud. Which has the best momentum right now?
evals.expected_output: Uses thematic ETFs like SMH, IGV, HACK, SKYY with XLK or QQQ as benchmark, provides relative strength comparison

evals.prompt: Compare US, Japan, Germany, and China equity markets. Where should I be overweight?
evals.expected_output: Uses country ETFs (SPY, EWJ, EWG, FXI or similar) with appropriate benchmark, discusses geographic rotation

evals.prompt: 港股各板块现在怎么样？科技、金融、地产、消费哪个强
evals.expected_output: Uses HK sector ETFs (3067.HK, 3033.HK, 3012.HK, 3040.HK) with 2800.HK benchmark, Chinese response
